meta.topic: postoperative discharge coordination after total hip arthroplasty
meta.source: Opus1.md converted to schema v1.2 case_study

stem.en: Review the client record and answer the case-study items about discharge readiness and care coordination.
stem.zh: 查看患者病历，并回答有关出院准备情况和护理协调的病例题。

title.en: Unfolding case: discharge coordination after right total hip arthroplasty
title.zh: 展开病例：右全髋关节置换术后的出院协调

summary.en: An 82-year-old Mandarin-speaking client is recovering from elective right total hip arthroplasty. The nurse must coordinate language access, mobility readiness, medication safety, home health services, and handoff planning before discharge home.
summary.zh: 一名82岁、主要讲普通话的患者正在从择期右全髋关节置换术中恢复。护士必须在患者回家出院前协调语言服务、活动能力准备、用药安全、居家护理服务和交接计划。

title.en: Postoperative day 0: admission record and initial assessment
title.zh: 术后第0天：入院记录和初始评估

content.en:
1530: Mrs. Chen, age 82, is admitted to the orthopedic surgical unit after uncomplicated elective right total hip arthroplasty for osteoarthritis. Primary language: Mandarin. She can exchange simple greetings in English but cannot reliably discuss medications, follow multistep instructions, or read English discharge documents. She lives alone in a second-floor walk-up apartment. Her adult son lives 2 hours away and works full-time. She does not own a smartphone and uses a corded landline at home.

History: hypertension, mild chronic kidney disease (baseline creatinine 1.3 mg/dL, eGFR 42 mL/min), and type 2 diabetes. No history of venous thromboembolism.

Orders: rivaroxaban 10 mg PO daily for 35 days for VTE prophylaxis; acetaminophen 1 g PO every 6 hr scheduled; oxycodone 5 mg PO every 4 hr PRN breakthrough pain; home amlodipine and metformin; incentive spirometry every 1-2 hr while awake; sequential compression devices while in bed; physical therapy consult on postoperative day 1; posterior hip precautions: no flexion beyond 90 degrees, no internal rotation, and no adduction past midline.

Initial findings at 1600: T 36.8 °C, HR 82, BP 138/78, RR 16, SpO₂ 96% on 2 L nasal cannula. Alert and oriented to person and place with interpreter phone assistance. Pain 5/10. Dressing clean, dry, intact; drain output 50 mL sanguineous since OR. Right pedal pulse 2+, capillary refill <3 sec, sensation intact, and dorsiflexion/plantarflexion present. Foley catheter draining clear yellow urine. Call light within reach and bed alarm activated. The nurse observes the client leaning across the bed rail for water, suggesting she may not understand fall-prevention instructions.

Baseline labs: Hgb 10.8 g/dL (pre-op 12.1), Hct 32%, platelets 198,000/µL, WBC 9,200/µL, INR 1.0, aPTT 28 sec, BUN 24 mg/dL, creatinine 1.4 mg/dL, eGFR 38 mL/min, K⁺ 4.0 mEq/L, Na⁺ 139 mEq/L, glucose 162 mg/dL, albumin 3.1 g/dL.

Chart concern: Mandarin is listed as the primary language. Informed consent was signed with an interpreter present, but no ongoing postoperative language-access plan is documented.
content.zh:
1530：陈女士，82岁，因骨关节炎接受择期右全髋关节置换术后入住骨科外科病区，手术过程无并发症。主要语言：普通话。她能用英语进行简单问候，但不能可靠地讨论药物、执行多步骤指令或阅读英文出院文件。她独自住在二楼无电梯公寓。成年儿子住在2小时车程外，并全职工作。她没有智能手机，家中使用有线座机。

病史：高血压、轻度慢性肾病（基础肌酐1.3 mg/dL，eGFR 42 mL/min）和2型糖尿病。无静脉血栓栓塞史。

医嘱：利伐沙班10 mg口服每日一次，共35天，用于VTE预防；对乙酰氨基酚1 g口服每6小时定时；羟考酮5 mg口服每4小时按需用于突破性疼痛；继续家庭剂量的氨氯地平和二甲双胍；清醒时每1–2小时使用激励肺量计；卧床时使用序贯加压装置；术后第1天物理治疗会诊；后路髋关节置换注意事项：髋屈曲不超过90度、不得内旋、不得内收越过中线。

1600初始评估：体温36.8 °C，心率82次/分，血压138/78 mmHg，呼吸16次/分，SpO₂ 96%（鼻导管2 L）。借助电话解释服务评估，患者能辨认本人和地点。疼痛5/10。敷料清洁、干燥、完整；从手术室至今引流出血性液体50 mL。右足背动脉搏动2+，毛细血管再充盈<3秒，感觉完整，可背屈和跖屈。导尿管引流清亮黄色尿液。呼叫铃在可及范围内，床报警已开启。护士观察到患者越过床栏伸手拿水，提示她可能不理解防跌倒指示。

基础实验室：血红蛋白10.8 g/dL（术前12.1），血细胞比容32%，血小板198,000/µL，白细胞9,200/µL，INR 1.0，aPTT 28秒，BUN 24 mg/dL，肌酐1.4 mg/dL，eGFR 38 mL/min，K⁺ 4.0 mEq/L，Na⁺ 139 mEq/L，血糖162 mg/dL，白蛋白3.1 g/dL。

病历关注点：病历列明主要语言为普通话。知情同意书在解释员在场时签署，但未记录术后持续语言服务计划。

title.zh: 术后第1天：出院准备筛查

title.en: Morning assessment, PT note, and education attempt
title.zh: 晨间评估、物理治疗记录和健康教育尝试

content.en:
About 18 hr after surgery: T 37.2 °C, HR 78, BP 132/74, RR 14, SpO₂ 97% on room air. Pain 4/10 at rest and 7/10 with movement using an interpreter phone. Drain removed per order; incision approximated with staples, mild ecchymosis, no erythema, and scant serous drainage. Foley removed; client voided 250 mL. Oral medications tolerated.

Repeat labs: Hgb 10.2 g/dL, creatinine 1.5 mg/dL, eGFR 36 mL/min, glucose 148 mg/dL.

PT session: Client sits at the edge of the bed and stands with a front-wheeled walker using moderate assistance from two people. She is unsteady, attempts to lift the walker, loses balance once but is caught by PT, and cannot safely rise from a standard-height chair independently. PT documents that she is not safe for discharge home without continued walker training and a home-safety evaluation. PT recommends at least two more sessions and home PT after discharge.

Teaching attempt: The nurse attempts hip-precaution and anticoagulant teaching using an English handout. The client nods and smiles but cannot demonstrate understanding. With interpreter phone assistance, she cannot state the medication name, purpose, bleeding signs to report, or what to do if a dose is missed. The nurse documents failed teach-back and the need for a certified Mandarin interpreter for comprehensive discharge teaching.

Unresolved discharge barriers: lives alone with no confirmed support for the first 48-72 hr; unsafe walker use; discharge teaching incomplete because of language barrier; no home health referral; uncertain rivaroxaban adherence; second-floor walk-up with no stair assessment; no confirmed follow-up appointment; creatinine trending upward while receiving a renally cleared anticoagulant.
content.zh:
术后约18小时：体温37.2 °C，心率78次/分，血压132/74 mmHg，呼吸14次/分，室内空气SpO₂ 97%。通过电话解释服务评估，静息疼痛4/10，活动时疼痛7/10。按医嘱拔除引流管；切口以皮钉闭合，轻度瘀斑，无红斑，少量浆液性渗液。拔除导尿管；患者自行排尿250 mL。可耐受口服药物。

复查实验室：血红蛋白10.2 g/dL，肌酐1.5 mg/dL，eGFR 36 mL/min，血糖148 mg/dL。

物理治疗记录：患者可在床边坐起，并在两人中等协助下使用前轮助行器站立。她步态不稳，试图把助行器抬起，曾失去平衡一次但被物理治疗师扶住，且无法独立安全地从标准高度椅子上站起。物理治疗记录显示，在继续助行器训练和居家安全评估之前，患者尚不适合回家出院。PT建议至少再进行两次训练，并在出院后安排居家物理治疗。

健康教育尝试：护士使用英文资料讲解髋关节注意事项和抗凝药。患者点头微笑，但不能证明理解。借助电话解释服务，她不能说出药名、用途、需报告的出血征象或漏服后的处理。护士记录回教失败，并记录需要合格普通话医疗解释员进行全面出院教育。

未解决的出院障碍：独居且最初48–72小时无确认照护者；助行器使用不安全；因语言障碍出院教育未完成；未转介居家护理；利伐沙班依从性不确定；二楼无电梯且尚未评估上下楼梯能力；未确认随访预约；正在使用经肾脏清除的抗凝药且肌酐上升。

title.en: Coordination update, renal trend, and teach-back session
title.zh: 协调进展、肾功能趋势和回教环节

content.en:
About 42 hr after surgery: T 36.9 °C, HR 74, BP 128/72, RR 14, SpO₂ 98% on room air. Pain 3/10 at rest and 5/10 with movement. Incision clean with staples intact and no signs of infection. Repeat creatinine 1.4 mg/dL after hydration and adequate oral intake; eGFR 39 mL/min. Hgb 10.0 g/dL.

Social work/case management interviews the client using a telephone interpreter. Her son can be present on the day of discharge and the following day, but not beyond that. She receives Meals on Wheels and has Medicare with a supplemental plan. Case management determines that she qualifies for Medicare home health services because she is homebound and requires skilled nursing plus home PT. The home health referral is initiated.

PT session: Client demonstrates safe walker use on level ground with standby assistance and can perform sit-to-stand from a raised toilet seat independently. Stairs have not yet been attempted. Afternoon PT stair training is planned.

Interpreter-mediated education: A certified in-person Mandarin interpreter is present. The nurse teaches posterior hip precautions, rivaroxaban purpose and 10 mg once-daily schedule for 35 days, bleeding signs, missed-dose instructions, pain medication safety, and when to call the surgeon or seek emergency care. The client accurately repeats key points in Mandarin, demonstrates hip precautions with a model, and identifies the rivaroxaban pill. She states she would need her son to call the surgeon because she cannot navigate the English phone tree alone. The nurse flags this as a remaining barrier.

Afternoon PT: Client negotiates four stairs up and down with a walker and one handrail with standby assistance. PT clears her for discharge home with home PT, front-wheeled walker, raised toilet seat, and reacher/grabber. The nurse requests a Mandarin-translated home exercise program. The surgeon writes a discharge order for postoperative day 3 morning pending nursing confirmation of discharge readiness.
content.zh:
术后约42小时：体温36.9 °C，心率74次/分，血压128/72 mmHg，呼吸14次/分，室内空气SpO₂ 98%。静息疼痛3/10，活动时5/10。切口清洁，皮钉完整，无感染迹象。补液并充分口服摄入后复查肌酐1.4 mg/dL，eGFR 39 mL/min。血红蛋白10.0 g/dL。

社会工作/个案管理通过电话解释员访谈患者。她的儿子可在出院当天和次日陪伴，但之后不能继续陪伴。她接受送餐服务，并有Medicare及补充保险。个案管理判断，由于她居家受限且需要专业护理和居家物理治疗，符合Medicare居家护理服务条件。居家护理转介已启动。

物理治疗：患者在平地使用助行器时仅需旁站协助，可独立从加高马桶座上坐站转换。尚未尝试楼梯。计划下午进行楼梯训练。

解释员参与的健康教育：合格的现场普通话医疗解释员在场。护士讲解后路髋关节注意事项、利伐沙班用途及10 mg每日一次共35天的服药安排、出血征象、漏服处理、止痛药安全，以及何时联系外科医生或急诊就医。患者能用普通话准确复述要点，用模型示范髋关节注意事项，并能辨认利伐沙班药片。她表示若有问题需让儿子致电外科医生，因为她无法独自应对英文电话系统。护士将此标记为剩余障碍。

下午物理治疗：患者在旁站协助下使用助行器和一侧扶手上下四级台阶。PT同意其在安排居家PT、前轮助行器、加高马桶座和取物器后回家出院。护士要求康复部门提供普通话版居家运动计划。外科医生开具术后第3天上午出院医嘱，前提是护士确认出院准备充分。

title.en: Postoperative day 3: final discharge verification and handoff
title.zh: 术后第3天：最终出院核查和交接

content.en:
About 66 hr after surgery: T 36.7 °C, HR 72, BP 126/70, RR 14, SpO₂ 99% on room air. Pain 2/10 at rest and 4/10 with movement, controlled with scheduled acetaminophen alone; client declined the last two oxycodone doses. Incision clean and dry. Creatinine 1.3 mg/dL, eGFR 42 mL/min. Hgb 9.8 g/dL and stable. Glucose 132 mg/dL.

Final readiness verification: The Visiting Nurse Association accepts the referral. First home visit for skilled nursing and PT is confirmed for the day after discharge. The nurse calls the receiving home health nurse using SBAR and communicates language needs, the need for an interpreter for teaching, social situation, functional status, equipment, rivaroxaban dose/duration and adherence concerns, renal-function trend, bleeding surveillance, son's role as the communication contact, and the confirmed follow-up appointment. The home health agency confirms that a Mandarin-speaking home health aide is available.

The nurse calls the surgeon's office to confirm the 2-week follow-up appointment and requests that a Mandarin interpreter be scheduled. The son arrives at 0900. With video interpreter assistance, the nurse reviews discharge instructions with the client and son together, confirms that the son understands how to reach the surgeon's office, provides the home health agency phone number, and gives the client a 7-day pill organizer labeled in Mandarin. The client is discharged at 1030 by wheelchair to her son's car with the walker, raised toilet seat, and reacher/grabber. The nurse documents that all identified discharge barriers are resolved or have a confirmed community plan of care.
content.zh:
术后约66小时：体温36.7 °C，心率72次/分，血压126/70 mmHg，呼吸14次/分，室内空气SpO₂ 99%。静息疼痛2/10，活动时4/10，仅用定时对乙酰氨基酚即可控制；患者拒绝了最近两次羟考酮。切口清洁干燥。肌酐1.3 mg/dL，eGFR 42 mL/min。血红蛋白9.8 g/dL且稳定。血糖132 mg/dL。

最终出院准备核查：访问护士协会接受转介。已确认出院后次日进行首次居家专业护理和物理治疗。护士使用SBAR致电接收的居家护理护士，沟通语言需求、所有教学需使用解释员、社会情况、功能状态、设备、利伐沙班剂量/疗程及依从性关注点、肾功能趋势、出血监测、儿子作为沟通联系人，以及已确认的随访预约。居家护理机构确认可安排会普通话的居家护理助理。

护士致电外科医生办公室确认2周随访预约，并要求安排普通话解释员。儿子于0900到达。护士借助视频解释员与患者和儿子共同复习出院说明，确认儿子知道如何联系外科医生办公室，提供居家护理机构电话号码，并给患者一盒以普通话标注的7天药盒。患者于1030坐轮椅至儿子的汽车，助行器、加高马桶座和取物器一并带走。护士记录所有已识别的出院障碍均已解决，或已有确认的社区照护计划。

stem.en: Postoperative day 0: The admission record lists Mandarin as the client's primary language, but no ongoing postoperative language-access plan is documented. Which action should the nurse take first?
stem.zh: 术后第0天：入院记录显示患者主要语言为普通话，但未记录持续的术后语言服务计划。护士首先应采取哪项措施？

options.en: Use simple English phrases and gestures until the formal discharge teaching session.
options.zh: 在正式出院教育前先使用简单英语短语和手势沟通。

options.en: Activate qualified interpreter services now, document the preferred language in the care plan, and flag the need for interpreter-supported discharge teaching.
options.zh: 立即启用合格解释服务，在护理计划中记录首选语言，并标记出院教育需要解释员支持。

options.en: Ask the son to interpret by telephone because he will help after discharge.
options.zh: 请儿子通过电话解释，因为他出院后会协助照护。

options.en: Wait for the surgical team to update the language-access plan during morning rounds.
options.zh: 等待外科团队在晨间查房时更新语言服务计划。

correct.en: The nurse should act immediately on the identified language-access gap. Qualified interpreter services are needed for assessment, symptom reporting, safety teaching, and informed participation in care; documenting the need also allows the team to plan complex discharge teaching ahead of time.
correct.zh: 护士应立即处理已识别的语言服务缺口。评估、症状报告、安全教育和参与护理决策都需要合格解释服务；记录该需求也能让团队提前安排复杂的出院教育。

byChoice.en: Simple English and gestures are not adequate for clinical communication about medications, precautions, pain, or safety risks.
byChoice.zh: 简单英语和手势不足以进行药物、注意事项、疼痛或安全风险方面的临床沟通。

byChoice.en: This addresses the cue directly and creates a documented plan for safe communication throughout the stay and at discharge.
byChoice.zh: 这项措施直接处理该线索，并为住院期间和出院时的安全沟通建立有记录的计划。

byChoice.en: Family may support the client, but the nurse should not rely on the son as the primary interpreter for clinical instructions, especially when qualified services are available.
byChoice.zh: 家属可以支持患者，但护士不应把儿子作为临床指示的主要解释者，尤其是在可获得合格解释服务时。

byChoice.en: Waiting delays safe communication and leaves the client unable to reliably report symptoms or understand immediate fall-prevention instructions.
byChoice.zh: 等待会延误安全沟通，使患者无法可靠报告症状或理解即时防跌倒指示。

testTakingStrategy.en: When a language barrier affects safety or consent, choose the action that establishes qualified communication immediately rather than relying on nodding, family, or delay.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 当语言障碍影响安全或知情参与时，应选择立即建立合格沟通的措施，而不是依赖点头、家属或拖延。

glossary.defZh: 指患者不能充分使用英语阅读、书写、说话或理解医疗信息，需要语言协助。
具备医疗解释能力、能准确传达医疗信息并保护保密性的解释人员。
记录患者护理需求、风险、目标和干预措施的计划。

stem.en: Postoperative day 1: The nurse uses an English handout to teach hip precautions and rivaroxaban safety. With interpreter phone assistance, the client cannot state the medication name, purpose, bleeding signs, or missed-dose instructions. Which nursing action is best?
stem.zh: 术后第1天：护士用英文资料讲解髋关节注意事项和利伐沙班安全。借助电话解释服务，患者仍不能说出药名、用途、出血征象或漏服处理。哪项护理措施最佳？

options.en: Document the failed teach-back, do not treat the client as discharge-ready, and arrange qualified Mandarin interpreter-supported comprehensive teaching.
options.zh: 记录回教失败，不将患者视为已具备出院准备，并安排合格普通话解释员支持的全面健康教育。

options.en: Repeat the same English handout more slowly and ask yes/no questions to confirm understanding.
options.zh: 用更慢的速度重复同一份英文资料，并用是/否问题确认理解。

options.en: Send the client home with written instructions because home health nursing will reinforce teaching tomorrow.
options.zh: 给患者书面说明后安排回家，因为居家护士明天会强化教育。

options.en: Ask the son to interpret the medication instructions by phone and document education as completed.
options.zh: 请儿子通过电话解释用药说明，并记录健康教育已完成。

correct.en: Teach-back failure is evidence that the client does not yet understand information required for safe self-care. The nurse should change the teaching approach, arrange qualified language support, and delay discharge-readiness clearance until understanding is demonstrated.
correct.zh: 回教失败说明患者尚未理解安全自我照护所需的信息。护士应改变教育方式，安排合格语言支持，并在患者能证明理解前不确认出院准备充分。

byChoice.en: This response recognizes the cue, documents the barrier, and creates a safe plan to complete teaching before discharge.
byChoice.zh: 该措施能识别线索、记录障碍，并建立出院前完成教育的安全计划。

byChoice.en: Repeating the same English materials does not address the underlying language and health-literacy barrier; yes/no answers are weak evidence of comprehension.
byChoice.zh: 重复同一份英文资料不能解决语言和健康素养障碍；是/否回答并不能有力证明理解。

byChoice.en: Home health can reinforce teaching, but the hospital nurse must not discharge a client who cannot yet demonstrate key medication and safety instructions.
byChoice.zh: 居家护理可以强化教育，但医院护士不能让尚无法证明理解关键用药和安全指示的患者出院。

byChoice.en: The son can be included as a support person, but telephone family interpretation alone is not appropriate for complex medication and postoperative teaching.
byChoice.zh: 儿子可作为支持者参与，但仅依赖家属电话解释不适合复杂用药和术后教育。

testTakingStrategy.en: A failed teach-back is not a documentation task only; it is a clinical cue that the education plan must change before discharge can be considered safe.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 回教失败不仅是记录问题；它是提示教育计划必须改变的临床线索，只有这样才能考虑安全出院。

glossary.defZh: 让患者用自己的话复述或示范所学内容，以确认理解程度的教育方法。
患者在医学、功能、教育和社会支持方面是否具备安全离院条件。
一种口服抗凝药，可用于髋关节置换术后预防静脉血栓栓塞。

stem.en: Postoperative day 1: The client is medically stable, but the discharge-readiness screen shows unsafe walker use, no confirmed home support, no home health referral, incomplete teaching, no stair assessment, and a rising creatinine while taking rivaroxaban. Which nursing actions are necessary to address the discharge barriers before the client goes home? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 术后第1天：患者医学状况稳定，但出院准备筛查显示助行器使用不安全、无确认居家支持、未转介居家护理、教育未完成、尚未评估楼梯能力，并且服用利伐沙班期间肌酐上升。为在患者回家前处理这些出院障碍，护士需要采取哪些措施？选择所有适用项。

options.en: Notify the charge nurse and surgical team that the planned discharge may be unsafe until barriers are addressed.
options.zh: 通知责任护士长和外科团队：在障碍解决前，原计划出院可能不安全。

options.en: Request social work/case management involvement to evaluate support, payer requirements, home health needs, and alternative post-acute options.
options.zh: 请求社会工作/个案管理介入，以评估支持系统、保险要求、居家护理需求和其他出院后照护选择。

options.en: Arrange certified Mandarin interpreter-supported discharge teaching and translated written materials.
options.zh: 安排合格普通话医疗解释员支持的出院教育和翻译后的书面资料。

options.en: Coordinate with PT for additional walker training, stair assessment, and equipment recommendations.
options.zh: 与物理治疗师协调进一步的助行器训练、楼梯评估和设备建议。

options.en: Reassess and document discharge readiness after services, teaching, mobility, equipment, follow-up, and medication-safety plans are confirmed.
options.zh: 在服务、教育、活动能力、设备、随访和用药安全计划均确认后，重新评估并记录出院准备情况。

options.en: Proceed with the planned discharge because vital signs and the incision are stable, and arrange home services after discharge if problems occur.
options.zh: 按原计划出院，因为生命体征和切口稳定；如出院后出现问题，再安排居家服务。

correct.en: All of the barrier-focused actions are needed: the team must be alerted that discharge is not yet safe, social work/case management must address support and post-acute services, certified interpreter-supported teaching and translated materials must be arranged, PT must complete mobility/stair/equipment planning, and the nurse must reassess readiness after the plans are confirmed. Stable vital signs and a clean incision do not make discharge safe when mobility, teaching, anticoagulant monitoring, language access, and home support barriers remain unresolved.
correct.zh: 所有针对障碍的措施都是必要的：必须提醒团队目前出院尚不安全；社会工作/个案管理需处理支持系统和出院后服务；需安排合格解释员支持的教育和翻译资料；PT需完成活动能力、楼梯和设备计划；护士还必须在各项计划确认后重新评估出院准备情况。即使生命体征稳定、切口清洁，只要活动、教育、抗凝监测、语言沟通和居家支持障碍仍未解决，出院仍不安全。

byChoice.en: This is necessary because the charge nurse and surgical team need early notice that the current discharge plan is unsafe until barriers are addressed.
byChoice.zh: 这是必要的，因为责任护士长和外科团队需要尽早知道：在障碍处理前，当前出院计划并不安全。

byChoice.en: This is necessary because home support, payer requirements, home health referral, and possible alternate post-acute placement require case management/social work coordination and lead time.
byChoice.zh: 这是必要的，因为居家支持、保险要求、居家护理转介和可能的其他出院后安置都需要个案管理/社会工作协调并需要准备时间。

byChoice.en: This is necessary because discharge medication teaching, hip precautions, and return demonstration cannot rely on nodding, gestures, limited English, or family interpretation.
byChoice.zh: 这是必要的，因为出院用药教育、髋关节注意事项和回示范不能依赖点头、手势、有限英语或家属解释。

byChoice.en: This is necessary because unsafe walker use and unassessed stairs are direct fall-risk barriers that PT must address before home discharge.
byChoice.zh: 这是必要的，因为助行器使用不安全和楼梯能力未评估是直接的跌倒风险障碍，PT必须在患者回家前处理。

byChoice.en: This is necessary because the nurse must close the loop by confirming that each identified barrier has been resolved or has a concrete plan before discharge.
byChoice.zh: 这是必要的，因为护士必须闭环确认每个已识别障碍已解决或已有具体计划后，才能出院。

byChoice.en: This is unsafe. Medical stability alone does not justify discharge when essential mobility, teaching, language-access, anticoagulant-safety, and home-support needs are unresolved.
byChoice.zh: 这是不安全的。仅有医学稳定并不能证明可以出院；活动能力、教育、语言沟通、抗凝安全和居家支持等关键需求仍未解决。

testTakingStrategy.en: For discharge-readiness questions, separate medical stability from safe transition readiness. Select actions that address each unresolved barrier and reject answers that defer essential services until after discharge.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 处理出院准备题时，要区分“医学稳定”和“安全过渡准备充分”。选择能处理每个未解决障碍的措施，并排除把关键服务推迟到出院后的选项。

glossary.defZh: 患者在医学、功能、教育、用药、设备和支持系统方面是否已具备安全离院条件。
协调出院去向、保险要求、医疗设备和社区服务的跨专业角色或流程。
将患者转介给居家护理机构，以在家中接受专业护理、康复或相关服务。
因活动能力、认知、药物、环境或设备问题导致跌倒可能性增加。

stem.en: Postoperative day 2: The client's creatinine rose from 1.4 mg/dL to 1.5 mg/dL on postoperative day 1 and improved to 1.4 mg/dL after hydration. eGFR is 39 mL/min. The client is prescribed rivaroxaban 10 mg once daily for 35 days after hip arthroplasty. For each proposed nursing action, select whether it is appropriate or inappropriate.
stem.zh: 术后第2天：患者肌酐从1.4 mg/dL在术后第1天升至1.5 mg/dL，补液后改善至1.4 mg/dL。eGFR为39 mL/min。患者医嘱为髋关节置换术后利伐沙班10 mg每日一次，共35天。请判断每项拟采取的护理措施是适当还是不适当。

rows.en: Notify the prescribing provider of the creatinine/eGFR trend and confirm the anticoagulant plan.
rows.zh: 将肌酐/eGFR趋势通知开药医嘱提供者，并确认抗凝计划。

rows.en: Hold the rivaroxaban independently because the creatinine increased on postoperative day 1.
rows.zh: 因术后第1天肌酐升高，护士自行停用利伐沙班。

rows.en: Teach the client to report blood in urine or stool, black stools, unusual bruising, bleeding gums, dizziness, or weakness.
rows.zh: 教育患者报告尿血或便血、黑便、异常瘀斑、牙龈出血、头晕或乏力。

rows.en: Tell the client that the 10 mg dose must be taken with a full meal for absorption.
rows.zh: 告知患者10 mg剂量必须随正餐服用以利吸收。

rows.en: Include renal-function trend, anticoagulant adherence, and bleeding surveillance in the home health handoff.
rows.zh: 在居家护理交接中纳入肾功能趋势、抗凝药依从性和出血监测。

correct.en: The nurse recognizes a relevant renal-function trend, communicates it to the prescriber, reinforces bleeding precautions and missed-dose safety, and includes monitoring needs in the handoff. The nurse should not independently hold an ordered anticoagulant, and the 10 mg rivaroxaban dose for hip replacement prophylaxis may be taken with or without food.
correct.zh: 护士应识别相关肾功能趋势，告知开药者，强化出血预防和漏服安全，并在交接中纳入监测需求。护士不应自行停用已开具的抗凝药；髋关节置换术后预防用利伐沙班10 mg可随餐或不随餐服用。

byChoice.en: Appropriate. The nurse should communicate the renal trend and confirm the prescriber's plan rather than independently deciding medication appropriateness.
byChoice.zh: 适当。护士应沟通肾功能趋势并确认开药者计划，而不是自行决定药物是否合适。

byChoice.en: Inappropriate. Holding VTE prophylaxis without an order can increase the risk of postoperative clot formation.
byChoice.zh: 不适当。未经医嘱停用VTE预防药可能增加术后血栓形成风险。

byChoice.en: Appropriate. Bleeding surveillance is essential for clients taking anticoagulants after surgery.
byChoice.zh: 适当。术后服用抗凝药的患者必须进行出血监测。

byChoice.en: Inappropriate. The 10 mg dose can be taken with or without food; teaching that food is mandatory is inaccurate for this dose.
byChoice.zh: 不适当。10 mg剂量可随餐或不随餐服用；告知必须随餐对该剂量并不准确。

byChoice.en: Appropriate. Home health needs the medication, renal-function, adherence, and bleeding-risk details to continue the safety plan.
byChoice.zh: 适当。居家护理需要了解药物、肾功能、依从性和出血风险细节，才能延续安全计划。

testTakingStrategy.en: For medication-safety questions, separate RN responsibilities—recognize trends, notify, teach, monitor, document—from prescriber responsibilities such as changing or stopping the medication.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 用药安全题要区分RN职责（识别趋势、通知、教育、监测、记录）和开药者职责（更改或停用药物）。

glossary.defZh: 估计肾脏过滤功能的指标，可帮助评估药物清除和肾功能变化。
降低血液凝固能力、用于预防或治疗血栓的药物。
通过药物、机械装置或活动等措施降低深静脉血栓和肺栓塞风险。

stem.en: Postoperative day 2: Interpreter-supported teach-back is successful, but the client states she cannot independently navigate the surgeon's English-language phone system. Which actions should the nurse include in the discharge plan? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 术后第2天：在解释员支持下回教成功，但患者表示无法独自应对外科医生办公室的英文电话系统。护士应在出院计划中纳入哪些措施？选择所有适用项。

options.en: Confirm that the son agrees to serve as the designated phone contact for the surgeon's office and document the plan.
options.zh: 确认儿子同意作为联系外科医生办公室的指定电话联系人，并记录该计划。

options.en: Provide large-print Mandarin instructions with the surgeon and home health phone numbers, or help set up accessible landline speed-dial instructions.
options.zh: 提供大字体普通话说明，写明外科医生和居家护理电话号码，或协助设置可用的座机快速拨号说明。

options.en: Tell the client to call 911 for all postoperative questions because she cannot use the office phone tree.
options.zh: 告诉患者因无法使用诊所电话系统，所有术后问题都应拨打911。

options.en: Communicate the phone-access barrier and family-contact plan to the home health agency during handoff.
options.zh: 在交接时向居家护理机构沟通电话联系障碍和家属联系计划。

options.en: Ask the surgeon's office to schedule a Mandarin interpreter for the follow-up appointment.
options.zh: 请求外科医生办公室为随访预约安排普通话解释员。

options.en: Take no further action because the client correctly repeated when to seek help.
options.zh: 不再采取其他措施，因为患者已正确复述何时需要求助。

correct.en: A safe discharge plan must account for the client's actual ability to access help, not only her ability to name danger signs. The nurse should build redundancy through a documented family contact, accessible written/phone supports, home health reinforcement, and interpreter support for follow-up care.
correct.zh: 安全出院计划必须考虑患者实际获得帮助的能力，而不只是能说出危险征象。护士应通过记录家属联系人、可及的书面/电话支持、居家护理强化和随访解释员支持来建立多重保障。

byChoice.en: Correct. The son is part of the practical access plan and his role must be confirmed and documented.
byChoice.zh: 正确。儿子是实际联系计划的一部分，必须确认并记录其角色。

byChoice.en: Correct. Written Mandarin instructions and accessible phone supports reduce the risk that the client cannot act on warning signs.
byChoice.zh: 正确。普通话书面说明和可及电话支持可降低患者知道危险征象却无法采取行动的风险。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Emergency services are appropriate for true emergencies, but routine postoperative questions and warning signs also require a workable pathway to the surgeon and home health team.
byChoice.zh: 错误。真正紧急情况应使用急救服务，但常规术后问题和预警征象也需要能联系外科医生和居家护理团队的可行途径。

byChoice.en: Correct. Home health needs to know the communication barrier so teaching and monitoring plans can be realistic.
byChoice.zh: 正确。居家护理需要了解沟通障碍，才能制定现实可行的教育和监测计划。

byChoice.en: Correct. Interpreter planning for follow-up supports meaningful participation and reduces the chance of missed or misunderstood postoperative instructions.
byChoice.zh: 正确。为随访安排解释员有助于患者有效参与，并降低漏听或误解术后指示的风险。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Knowing when to seek help is not sufficient if the client lacks a realistic way to reach the care team.
byChoice.zh: 错误。仅知道何时求助还不够；如果患者没有现实途径联系医疗团队，仍不安全。

testTakingStrategy.en: In discharge questions, look beyond knowledge. A client must also have the functional, language, phone, transportation, and support systems needed to carry out the plan.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 出院题不要只看知识掌握。患者还必须具备执行计划所需的功能能力、语言支持、电话途径、交通和支持系统。

glossary.defZh: 患者从一个照护环境转到另一个环境时，信息、责任和后续计划的交接过程。
通过多个相互支持的途径降低单一计划失败造成风险的安全策略。
出院后为评估恢复、调整治疗和处理问题而安排的门诊复诊。

stem.en: Postoperative day 3: The nurse is giving a verbal SBAR handoff to the receiving home health nurse. Which information is essential to include? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 术后第3天：护士正在向接收的居家护理护士进行SBAR口头交接。哪些信息必须纳入？选择所有适用项。

options.en: The client requires Mandarin interpretation for teaching and clinical communication.
options.zh: 患者在健康教育和临床沟通中需要普通话解释服务。

options.en: Rivaroxaban 10 mg daily is prescribed for 35 days; adherence and bleeding signs need monitoring.
options.zh: 医嘱为利伐沙班10 mg每日一次，共35天；需要监测依从性和出血征象。

options.en: Creatinine trended up transiently and returned to baseline; ongoing renal-function awareness is needed.
options.zh: 肌酐曾短暂升高后回到基础水平；仍需关注肾功能。

options.en: The client lives alone in a second-floor walk-up after the son leaves, and home safety/stair navigation need assessment.
options.zh: 儿子离开后患者独自住在二楼无电梯公寓，需要评估居家安全和上下楼梯。

options.en: The client preferred hot tea during hospitalization and declined the last two oxycodone doses.
options.zh: 患者住院期间偏好热茶，并拒绝了最近两次羟考酮。

options.en: Equipment, functional status, follow-up appointment, and son's role as the phone contact have been confirmed.
options.zh: 设备、功能状态、随访预约以及儿子作为电话联系人的角色均已确认。

correct.en: The handoff must transmit the risks that could cause transition failure: language needs, anticoagulant adherence and bleeding monitoring, renal-function context, social isolation and home layout, mobility/equipment needs, follow-up, and the designated communication contact. These data allow the home health nurse to continue the safety plan without information loss.
correct.zh: 交接必须传递可能导致转衔失败的风险：语言需求、抗凝药依从性和出血监测、肾功能背景、社会孤立和居家环境、活动/设备需求、随访以及指定沟通联系人。这些资料能让居家护理护士在不丢失信息的情况下延续安全计划。

byChoice.en: Correct. Language needs shape how all teaching, assessment, and symptom reporting must occur.
byChoice.zh: 正确。语言需求决定所有教育、评估和症状报告应如何进行。

byChoice.en: Correct. Anticoagulant dose, duration, adherence, and bleeding surveillance are high-priority safety details.
byChoice.zh: 正确。抗凝药剂量、疗程、依从性和出血监测属于高优先级安全信息。

byChoice.en: Correct. Renal-function context matters because rivaroxaban has renal clearance and the client has baseline CKD.
byChoice.zh: 正确。因利伐沙班部分经肾脏清除且患者有基础CKD，肾功能背景很重要。

byChoice.en: Correct. Living alone in a walk-up apartment affects fall risk, access to care, and the home safety assessment.
byChoice.zh: 正确。独居在无电梯楼房会影响跌倒风险、获得照护能力和居家安全评估。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Declining oxycodone can support pain-control assessment, but tea preference is not essential transition-safety information; the option mixes a minor preference with a noncritical detail.
byChoice.zh: 错误。拒绝羟考酮可用于评估疼痛控制，但饮茶偏好不是关键转衔安全信息；该选项把次要偏好与非关键细节混在一起。

byChoice.en: Correct. Equipment, function, follow-up, and phone-contact arrangements are all needed for continuity of the discharge plan.
byChoice.zh: 正确。设备、功能状态、随访和电话联系人安排都是延续出院计划所需的信息。

testTakingStrategy.en: For handoff items, choose information that changes the receiving clinician's monitoring, teaching, safety checks, or follow-up actions.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 交接题应选择会改变接收方临床人员监测、教育、安全检查或随访行动的信息。

glossary.defZh: 按情况、背景、评估、建议组织临床沟通的结构化交接工具。
在患者家中提供专业护理评估、教育、监测和护理协调的护士。
患者在不同照护环境之间转移时，护理信息和计划能持续衔接。

correct.en: This case emphasizes that safe discharge after hip arthroplasty requires more than stable vital signs and a written discharge order. The nurse must verify language access, teach-back, mobility and stair safety, anticoagulant monitoring, home health acceptance, equipment, follow-up, and a practical communication plan before releasing a high-risk older adult home.
correct.zh: 本病例强调，髋关节置换术后安全出院不仅需要生命体征稳定和书面出院医嘱。护士必须在高风险老年患者回家前确认语言服务、回教效果、活动和楼梯安全、抗凝药监测、居家护理机构接受、设备、随访以及实际可行的沟通计划。

testTakingStrategy.en: For unfolding discharge cases, track each barrier over time and ask whether it has been resolved, delegated to the right discipline, or converted into a confirmed community plan.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 展开式出院病例中，要持续追踪每个障碍，并判断它是否已解决、已交给合适专业人员处理，或已转化为确认的社区照护计划。

glossary.defZh: 用人工假体替换受损髋关节结构的手术。
后路髋关节置换术后用于降低脱位风险的活动限制，如避免髋屈曲超过90度、内旋和内收越过中线。
会影响患者安全离院或在家中执行护理计划的医学、功能、教育、社会或系统因素。
组织不同专业、服务和资源，使患者获得连续且安全的护理。
